_comment: Known-accepted PII exceptions. Reserve for cases where the value is legitimately committed (e.g., a golden test fixture captured from real production). Every entry needs a reason and approval trail. Adding here suppresses ALL pattern scans on the matching path.

allow.reason: Golden test fixture captured from real Fidelity history import; real employer string is intentional and accepted
Synthetic test fixture filenames (Balances_for_Account_Z123) — Z123 is a fake account label, not real account data
Illustrative example dates (Portfolio_Positions_Mar-06-2026.csv) in workflow documentation; not real account data
AojdevStudio is the canonical public repo owner (star-history link); this is a public repo by design, not PII to scrub
repo: AojdevStudio/Finance-Guru is the real GitHub repo, required for issue-routing config to function
